documentation.xhtml: Tool version : '8.4.9308.1109' (MultiTool build version) Xml version : '5.2' (MultiTool xml file version) Control Unit : 'EPEC_CU4' (Name of the unit in MultiTool) Control Unit Type : '6807' (Type of the unit in MultiTool, including the functional version) CODESYS Profile : 'CODESYS V3.5 SP19 Patch 6' (CODESYS profile that was selected in MultiTool) Device Description Version: '2.1.0.7' (Device description version that was selected in MultiTool) Export Time : '15.05.2026 11:30.02' (Date and time when exported from MultiTool) Export Path : 'D:\4_AIProject\4_CoDeSys\AI_MutiTool\MultiToolProject\E2EProject\EPEC_CU4' (Path where MultiTool exported) Project File : 'D:\4_AIProject\4_CoDeSys\AI_MutiTool\MultiToolProject\E2EProject\DasDemoProject.mtproject' (MultiTool project file name that was used) Libraries Path : 'D:\4_AIProject\4_CoDeSys\AI_MutiTool\MultiToolProject\E2EProject\EPEC_CU4\Libraries'

ST.xhtml: ; DEV_DSC_BUZZER := BUZZER_CONTROL;
(* Call user application *) Main();

(*###########################################################*) (*This block is created implicit. Don't add own code to here.*) (*###########################################################*)
EPEC_6000INT.GetSystemDateAndTime( i_Enable := G_UI.SystemTimeEnable, i_Offset := G_UI.UITimeOffset, o_SystemTime => G_UI.SystemTime, o_UITime => G_UI.UITime, o_Error => G_UI.SystemTimeError );

documentation.xhtml: Total size of NVRAM reserved for code template (IEC area 496 kB)
Size of the GlobE NVRAM reservation
Size of the Azure NVRAM reservation
Offset of the Azure NVRAM area.
Offset of the GlobE NVRAM area.
Size of the OD parameter area reservation.
Size of the user NVRAM reservation.
Offset of the user NVRAM area.
Offset of the machine type area.
Maximum size of one parameter handler block
Size of the machine type area reservation.
Flag indicates if unit is wanted to reset after current application cycle. Reset actions can be varied between platforms.
Function block instance which is used for voltage and temperature monitoring.
Add all automatically generated events to log.
Off delay for automatically generated events.
On delay for automatically generated events.
Pointer to the start of the NVRAM area.
Pointer to the start of the OD parameter image.
Pointer to the start of the EventLog
Pointer to the start of the user NVRAM area.
Pointer to the start of the GlobE NVRAM area.
Pointer to the start of the Azure NVRAM area.
Pointer to the start of the J1939 DM2 NVRAM area.
Pointer to the start of the Machine type NVRAM area.
Shared memory structure which is used to get pointer to MRAM area for parameter saving.
Counter used to detect if communication parameters need to be saved
/Counter used to detect if communication parameters need to be restored
Number of CSV line containing error

16#2130 Software information Sub1: Application version Sub2: Additional version information Sub3: Additional version information Sub4: Additional version information Sub5: Additional version information Sub6: Additional version information Sub7: Additional version information Sub8: Additional version information Sub9: Additional version information Sub10: Additional version information
16#2140 MAC address Sub1: MAC address byte 1 Sub2: MAC address byte 2 Sub3: MAC address byte 3 Sub4: MAC address byte 4 Sub5: MAC address byte 5 Sub6: MAC address byte 6

16#2141 Ethernet configuration Sub1: Ethernet enabled/disabled Sub2: DHCP on/off Sub3: Reserved Sub4: Reserved Sub5: Reserved Sub6: Reserved Sub7: Reserved Sub8: Reserved Sub9: Reserved Sub10: Reserved Sub11: Reserved Sub12: Reserved Sub13: Reserved Sub14: Reserved Sub15: Reserved Sub16: Reserved Sub17: Reserved Sub18: Netstatus Sub19: IP address highest byte Sub20: IP address 3rd byte Sub21: IP address 2nd byte Sub22: IP address lowest byte Sub23: Gateway highest byte Sub24: Gateway 3rd byte Sub25: Gateway 2nd byte Sub26: Gateway lowest byte Sub27: Netmask highest byte Sub28: Netmask 3rd byte Sub29: Netmask 2nd byte Sub30: Netmask first byte Sub31: Reserved Sub32: Reserved Sub33: Reserved Sub34: Reserved Sub35: Reserved Sub36: Reserved Sub37: Reserved Sub38: Reserved Sub39: Reserved Sub40: Reserved Sub41: Reserved Sub42: Reserved Sub43: Reserved Sub44: Reserved Sub45: Reserved Sub46: Reserved Sub47: Reserved Sub48: Reserved Sub49: Reserved Sub50: Reserved

16#2150 CAN 1 Communication parameters Sub1: Codesys communication enabled Sub2: Node id for Codesys communication Sub3: Bit rate for CAN1 Sub4: Reserved Sub5: Reserved Sub6: Reserved Sub7: Reserved Sub8: Reserved Sub9: Reserved Sub10: Node id for PLCopen application CANopen device

16#2151 CAN 2 Communication parameters Sub1: Codesys communication enabled Sub2: Node id for Codesys communication Sub3: Bit rate for CAN2 Sub4: Reserved Sub5: Reserved Sub6: Reserved Sub7: Reserved Sub8: Reserved Sub9: Reserved Sub10: Node id for PLCopen application CANopen device

This object is created by Epec MultiTool. User changes are overwritten when project is imported.
Content: - System information common for all ODs.
Parameterhandler. Utility library for ODSave. Library handles parameter image modification.
Project key, used for validating the response code
System time is updated when Enable = TRUE
Error code is reset if Enable is set to FALSE
Method which is used to set current time
